name: SX1509 16 channel I/O Expander with LED driver and keypad engine
description: The SX1509 component allows you to expand your I/O capabilities: ([datasheet](https://www.semtech.com/uploads/documents/sx1509_evk_users_guide.pdf), [SparkFun](https://learn.sparkfun.com/tutorials/sx1509-io-expander-breakout-hookup-guide/all)) in ESPHome. It uses [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x3E`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this SX1509 component.

config_entries.label: Keypad
config_entries.description: Add this to enable the keypad.

config_entries.label: Key Columns
config_entries.description: The number of keypad columns to use. This enables any number of the last 8 pins. So a value of 4 enables pins 8,9,10,11 to be used as the columns for the keypad matrix. This value must be between 1 and 8.

config_entries.label: Key Rows
config_entries.description: The number of keypad rows to use. This enables any number of the first 8 pins. So a value of 3 enables pins 0,1,2 to be used as the rows for the keypad matrix. This value must be between 2 and 8.

config_entries.label: Debounce Time
config_entries.description: The debounce time is common to all IOs.

config_entries.label: Keys
config_entries.description: The keys present on the matrix, from top left to bottom right, row by row. Required for `key_collector`.

config_entries.label: Scan Time
config_entries.description: Scan time per row (must be set above debounce time).

config_entries.label: Sleep Time
config_entries.description: No key press within this time will set keypad engine to sleep.
